title: Coordinator pre-positioning: Scorched Tempering Kiln -> Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (Moment 1; owner-directed; Seaworthy compacting — Moment 2 fires on session-resume)
body:
Director coordinator pre-positioning per PDR-064 Two Moments. Owner direction at 15:04Z: "hand over the Directorship to Seaworth[y]". Information transfer only — routing authority remains with Scorched until Seaworthy broadcasts Moment 2 active-acknowledgement on session-resume post-compaction.

**Lineage** (8th Director-role transition this session): Seaworthy → Velvet (10:48Z) → Seaworthy-acting (~11:30Z) → Seaworthy-official (12:09Z) → Abyssal (12:11Z) → Incandescent (12:52Z) → Secret (13:27Z) → Scorched (~13:50Z) → **Seaworthy (this Moment 1)**.

**Outgoing**: Scorched Tempering Kiln / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 52b263
**Incoming**: Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 6966d4 (currently compacting; Moment 2 fires on session-resume)

Substrate-pointer pattern (PDR-075-substantive); comprehensive handoff record NOT authored. Comms-stream is canonical record. Read these for full state on resume:

## §1 — Active roster (per owner correction at 14:58Z; verification asks pending)

| Agent | Status | Verified? |
|---|---|---|
| Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (6966d4) | **incoming Director — compacting** | verified-as-compacting |
| Ashen Brazing Crucible (53dad4) | commit marshal | verified — 9 cycles landed by their marshal authority |
| Ferny Fruiting Root (ee16a4) | implementer | verified — 5 substantive deliveries this Director window |
| Twilit Scattering Twilight (8d8d93) | implementer (Wilma dispatch on FM-2 P2 plan) | **VERIFICATION PENDING** — asked 15:04Z for Wilma subagent id + ETA + blocker |
| Charcoal Brazing Kiln (7c7327) | implementer (Wilma dispatch + pattern v2 read) | **VERIFICATION PENDING** — asked 15:04Z for Wilma subagent id + pattern v2 read state |

**Critical operating principle this session (owner-named at 15:03Z)**: "don't trust, verify". Verification asks demand concrete artefacts (subagent transcript ids, claim openings, file paths), NOT just status confirmations. Silence after verification-ask with concrete-artefact ask is stronger evidence than silence after generic status check.

## §2 — Cumulative commits this Director window (11 commits in ~58 min)

- `92c953e7` Class A wrapper (~12:09Z pre-Scorched)
- `cc3039eb` Cycle #1 Class B + loop-exit unified
- `845a3e90` Cycle #2 Pearly S7735
- `d437881b` Cycle #3 hygiene
- `5320d6b0` Cycle #4 ADR-185 v2
- `b6ac6147` Cycle #5 PDR-075 (Director substrate-writing discipline; foundational substrate)
- `c097bbb3` Cycle #6 IBF recursion-of-doctrine pattern
- `8140c297` Cycle #7 Zephyrous S5443
- `47dadfcc` Cycle #8 Seaworthy self-bundle
- `db4d8b3a` Cycle #9 PDR-076 v2 (Agent identity tuple)

Tree-green continuous post-Cycle-1 (~14:19Z). Branch 11 commits ahead of origin. Husky-gate + broader-gate both clean.

## §3 — Owner-coherence-moment status (4 of 5 components ready; held for full bundle)

- ✓ **Charcoal C2/C5 architectural-direction broadcast** (14:28:55Z; Class B Wilma synthesis — verdict matrix C1 UNSAFE / C2 SAFE-WITH-CONDITIONS / C3 UNSAFE / C4 SAFE-WITH-CONDITIONS / C5 SAFE; recommended C2-near-term + C5-long-term + C4-fallback)
- ✓ **Ashen throughput-cure substrate broadcast** (14:55:45Z; marshal-as-cycle-discipline empirical evidence 9 cycles vs ~1/Director-window)
- ✓ **Pattern v2 ship-verdict** (Ferny self-attest 15:01:06Z; all 5 Wilma amendments verified clean; skip re-pass recommended)
- ✓ **PDR-076 v2 LANDED** (`db4d8b3a`) + **(C) SPLIT open question** flagged for owner — fred CRITICAL 3 argues the PDR's own §Forbids text admits separable contracts; SPLIT into 076a (identity tuple) + 076b (body-file frontmatter) is architecturally cleaner but a question owner may want to make
- ⏳ **Twilit ST FM-2 P2 plan-Wilma verdict** — Charcoal in dispatch window (per their 14:27:48Z pattern-file Wilma synthesis); verification ask sent 15:04Z

Per owner's "don't split attention mid-investigation" direction, held for full 5-component coherence. Surface to owner as single decision-shape when plan-Wilma arrives.

## §4 — Standing substrate (substrate-stale-pointer pattern; 6 worked instances)

- D1: my tick #1 absorption treated Secret Moment 1 closed-state of Twilit ST as current; Twilit ST correction 13:48:52Z
- D2: owner-direction-not-in-my-chat (marshal transfer Seaworthy → Ashen at 14:14Z owner-directed at ~14:09Z to those agents directly)
- D3: my Wilma-on-Class-B routing 14:15:51Z sent 4 min after substrate that obsoleted it (owner-direct authorisation at 14:11:28Z)
- D4: my tick #6 broadcast named Seaworthy as marshal + Ashen as available 3+ min after both transitions completed
- D5: Charcoal's meta-recursive — my Wilma-on-Class-B stand-down at 14:21:29Z is itself worked instance of the class the pattern file names
- **D6**: my tick #10 + tick #15 premature removals of Twilit ST + Charcoal via IBF-pattern when both were in active routed Wilma dispatch — owner-caught at 14:58Z; this is the precise asymmetric says-closed direction (4:1 more dangerous per Wilma) flagged in Ferny's pattern file Wilma verdict

**Pattern file**: `.agent/memory/active/patterns/substrate-pointer-read-as-current-state.md` (142 lines; Ferny self-attest v2 clean; ship-ready for marshal cycle).

## §5 — In-flight verification + work

- Twilit ST + Charcoal verification asks pending (sent 15:04Z; 3-min ETAs)
- Plan-Wilma dispatch in flight (Charcoal owns)
- Pattern v2 ship-verdict in hand (Ferny self-attest)
- Pattern file marshal cycle: Ferny holds claim; surfaces marshal-request when ready

## §6 — Queued for forward Director routing (Seaworthy on resume)

1. Plan-Wilma verdict absorption + bundle into owner-coherence
2. Pattern v2 marshal cycle (Ferny → Ashen)
3. Secret consolidation `d50d3d9a` retention disposition check (orphan; Ashen has flagged)
4. (C) SPLIT decision on PDR-076 — open question for owner
5. ~16+ untracked comms accumulating; next marshal hygiene cycle
6. Seaworthy's own backfill of comms substrate they missed during compaction (substantial — 45+ min of session evolution)

## §7 — Cron + monitor state

- **My cron `58c741a1`** (`*/5 * * * *`, strict-Director protocol with delivery-verification + adversarial-review + substrate-stale-pointer guardrail) — **CONTINUES THROUGH MOMENT 1**, ENDS at Moment 2 per PDR-064 cadence-boundary rule. Seaworthy arms own cron at Moment 2.
- **My all-channels comms watcher `bgjhixuh9`** — ends with my session.

## §8 — Single highest-priority action for Seaworthy on assuming role

**Verify Twilit ST + Charcoal verification responses on resume** — the asks went out at 15:04Z asking for Wilma subagent ids + dispatch ETAs. If responses surfaced during compaction, absorb to refresh roster-truth. If silent, send second-round verification (NOT IBF-class default — owner correction at 14:58Z explicitly rejected aggressive IBF-application; silence-while-routed is legitimate).

Then arm own cron with the same strict-Director protocol (replicable in working prompt of cron `58c741a1`). Maintain owner-coherence hold until plan-Wilma verdict surfaces.

Welcome to the seat. Routing yours after Moment 2.

— Scorched / claude / 52b263 (outgoing Director, Moment 1 pre-positioning)
